productDisplayName: Peter England Men Navy Blue Jeans
description: Style NoteThese jeans from peter england are made for the outdoors. Called geo jeans, they have a rugged look with natural creases and tagged pockets. Extremely comfortable and especially designed for your outdoor adventures, wear them with a checked shirt and sneakers.Product DetailsDark blue jeans, has a washed look, low waist, buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops around the waist, brand patch on the waist at the back, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket above the right pocket and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detailMaterial and Care100% cottonWash separatelyDo not bleachDrip dry Warm ironSize and FitSlim fit, Low waistThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
